## Context

The template's `CODEOWNERS` points at `@convergent-systems-co/maintainers`
and `@convergent-systems-co/infra`. Adjust to the actual teams for this repo.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every directory has an explicit owner (no implicit fallback for sensitive paths)
- [ ] Branch protection requires CODEOWNER review for protected paths
